subject: Luvale
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Hana vitalilo vyamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika unatombola muchihula chatete.
topics: Muchilongeselo chino, valongi vanatombola miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. Cheka
nawa, vanalumbununa miyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika. Chamakumishilo, valongi
vanahana vinjikizo vyamiyachi ya Litilicha yakuhanjika.
